ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the league belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the team is currently in */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the team has */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the team has */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the team has */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws the team has */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., H, A, NH) */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder, defender) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "home_team_long_passes" INTEGER /* Number of long passes by the home team */,
  "away_team_long_passes" INTEGER /* Number of long passes by the away team */,
  "home_team_short_passes" INTEGER /* Number of short passes by the home team */,
  "away_team_short_passes" INTEGER /* Number of short passes by the away team */,
  "home_team_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_team_shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the away team */,
  "home_team_corners_taken" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_corners_taken" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offsides committed by the home team */,
  "away_team_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offsides committed by the away team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
